interaction_phrase: established an office in Stuttgart at ARENA2036
occurrence_sentence: As a Dutch-German deep-tech company, QuiX Quantum is already actively engaged in the Baden-Württemberg regional innovation ecosystem. interaction_phrase: welcome QuiX Quantum to the QuantumBW network
occurrence_sentence: "We are pleased to welcome QuiX Quantum to the QuantumBW network. With its focus on photonic quantum computing and its growing presence in Baden-Württemberg, QuiX Quantum adds an important industrial perspective to our ecosystem.

interaction_phrase: welcome QuiX Quantum as a member
occurrence_sentence: "We are delighted to welcome QuiX Quantum as a member of Photonics BW. Photonics is a key enabling technology for the next generation of quantum systems, and companies like QuiX Quantum demonstrate how optical technologies can be translated into scalable, industrial quantum solutions.

"Strong ecosystems are essential to bring quantum technologies from research into industrial application. QuantumBW and Photonics BW connect the right capabilities across science, industry and technology transfer. We are proud to become part of these networks and look forward to contributing to an even stronger photonic and quantum ecosystem in Baden-Württemberg, the Netherlands and across Europe," said Robin Wittland, Chief Commercial Officer at QuiX Quantum.

"Strong ecosystems are essential to bring quantum technologies from research into industrial application. QuantumBW and Photonics BW connect the right capabilities across science, industry and technology transfer. We are proud to become part of these networks and look forward to contributing to an even stronger photonic and quantum ecosystem in Baden-Württemberg, the Netherlands and across Europe," said Robin Wittland, Chief Commercial Officer at QuiX Quantum.

QuiX Quantum, the leading European developer of photonic quantum computing systems, today announced the appointment of Robin Wittland as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO).

interaction_phrase: Europe accelerates strategic investment in quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: while Europe accelerates strategic investment in quantum technologies, infrastructure, and sovereign capability.

interaction_phrase: appoints Robin Wittland as Chief Commercial Officer
occurrence_sentence: QuiX Quantum, the leading European developer of photonic quantum computing systems, today announced the appointment of Robin Wittland as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO).

interaction_phrase: Europe accelerates strategic investment in quantum technologies, infrastructure, and sovereign capability
occurrence_sentence: With more than 15 customers worldwide, market validation has positioned Quix Quantum well beyond pure R&D to deployment, while Europe accelerates strategic investment in quantum technologies, infrastructure, and sovereign capability.

"QuiX Quantum has built a highly differentiated position in photonic quantum computing and is entering a phase where commercial execution becomes increasingly important," said Robin Wittland, the newly appointed CCO.
"Robin combines deep enterprise sales experience with a strong understanding of complex technology markets," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of Quix Quantum.

interaction_phrase: At QuiX Quantum, Wittland will focus
occurrence_sentence: At QuiX Quantum, Wittland will focus on scaling the company's commercial organization, expanding strategic customer engagements, building industry and government relationships, strengthening the partner ecosystem, and supporting the company's next and advanced stages of growth.
"Robin combines deep enterprise sales experience with a strong understanding of complex technology markets," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of Quix Quantum.
Prior to joining QuiX Quantum, he served as Chief Commercial Officer at planqc, helping to shape the company's commercial strategy in neutral-atom quantum computing.

At QuiX Quantum, Wittland will focus on scaling the company's commercial organization, expanding strategic customer engagements, building industry and government relationships, strengthening the partner ecosystem, and supporting the company's next and advanced stages of growth.

QuiX Quantum today introduced PACU, its new Photonic Assembly Control Unit designed to provide a scalable, standardized control layer for the company's photonic quantum systems and future universal quantum computers.
"As photonic quantum chips become more capable, the systems around them must scale as well," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

QuiX Quantum has positioned photonics as the basis for its universal quantum computing roadmap, with systems designed for modularity, data-center compatibility, and integration into hybrid quantum-classical computing environments.
"As photonic quantum chips become more capable, the systems around them must scale as well," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

QuiX Quantum's photonic systems are designed around integrated silicon nitride photonic chips and are intended to operate in data center and HPC settings, where footprint, serviceability and system stability are important deployment considerations.
With offices across Europe, QuiX Quantum continues to push the boundaries of quantum technology while serving a growing global customer base.

"Universal photonic quantum computing requires more than high-quality photonic chips. It requires a complete system stack that can generate, route, measure and control photons in real time," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

QuiX Quantum today announced the first installation of its Feed-Forward Control Unit (FFCU), a high-performance hardware component developed for the company's universal photonic quantum computing architecture.

"Universal photonic quantum computing requires more than high-quality photonic chips. It requires a complete system stack that can generate, route, measure and control photons in real time," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

interaction_phrase: vice president of R&D for QuiX Quantum
occurrence_sentence: "Fast feed-forward is a prerequisite for universal photonic quantum computing because measurement-based architectures require the system to detect, decide and reconfigure the optical path in real time," said Andrew Roos, vice president of R&D for QuiX Quantum.

interaction_phrase: vice president of R&D for QuiX Quantum
occurrence_sentence: "Fast feed-forward is a prerequisite for universal photonic quantum computing because measurement-based architectures require the system to detect, decide and reconfigure the optical path in real time," said Andrew Roos, vice president of R&D for QuiX Quantum.

The project was conducted on the QuiX BiaTM Cloud Quantum Computing Service in collaboration with NASA's Quantum Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, the University of Twente, and Freie Universität Berlin.

interaction_phrase: QuiX quantum computing platform based on photonics
occurrence_sentence: The achievement marks the first time a European company has demonstrated a production-ready method of error reduction, demonstrating the scalability of the QuiX quantum computing platform based on photonics.

"Below-threshold, physical error mitigation has never been implemented in a photonic quantum computer. This achievement marks a significant milestone and places QuiX Quantum at the forefront of progress toward fault-tolerant photonic quantum computing," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

"Below-threshold, physical error mitigation has never been implemented in a photonic quantum computer. This achievement marks a significant milestone and places QuiX Quantum at the forefront of progress toward fault-tolerant photonic quantum computing," said Stefan Hengesbach, CEO of QuiX Quantum.

interaction_phrase: director of the Institute of Theoretical Nanoelectronics at the Peter Grünberg Institute
occurrence_sentence: "This paper represents an important jump forward towards large-scale photonic quantum computing," said David DiVincenzo, director of the Institute of Theoretical Nanoelectronics at the Peter Grünberg Institute at the Forschungszentrum Jülich."
